title: trades.raw
description: One executed trade republished from the Coinbase Exchange `matches` channel onto the Kafka topic `trades.raw`. Kafka message key is the `symbol` string (UTF-8), which preserves per-symbol ordering across partitions.

symbol.description: Coinbase product id, e.g. BTC-USD. Also the Kafka message key.

size.description: Trade size in base currency. May be very small (scientific notation in JSON, e.g. 8e-08).

side.description: Side of the resting (maker) order that was matched, per Coinbase.

trade_id.description: Coinbase trade id, monotonically increasing per product.

ts.description: Exchange trade execution time, ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 (UTC, 'Z').
